message:
fix(pcs): reject duplicate members and fix HKDF capacity calculations

Harden the PCS group state machine against two classes of bugs:

Duplicate member prevention:
- add_member() now checks member_index for an existing node_id before
  inserting, returning PcsError::DuplicateMember if the node is already
  in the group — previously this would silently corrupt member_index by
  overwriting the old index while leaving the stale entry in the members
  Vec
- Add test: add_duplicate_member_fails verifies error and group
  state immutability

HKDF info buffer capacity fixes:
- derive_epoch_zone_key: account for the "|" separator byte between
  zone_id and epoch (was off by 1)
- derive_epoch_zone_key_id: same off-by-1 fix for the separator
- derive_post_removal_secret: correct prefix length from 16 to 14
  ("REMOVAL-REKEY|" is 14 bytes, not 16)
- Add inline comments documenting exact byte math for each buffer

Benchmark improvement:
- bench_memory_footprint: use size_of_val(&state) for actual struct
  layout measurement instead of size_of::<PcsGroupState>() which
  only measures the static size; add comment noting heap allocations
  for HashMap/Vec/String are not captured

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
